title: Trigger Utilities
description:
This is a datapack add some useful trigger commands.  
/trigger hat/separate_item/kill/sit/death_point/rtp
body:
# Trigger utilities

This is a datapack add some useful trigger commands.  
/trigger hat/separate_item/kill/sit/death_point/rtp

- Author: Minecraft_hyr
- Version: 1.1
- Supported MC versions: 1.20.2

### Feature List

<details><summary style="font-size:18px">English</summary>

- `/reload`  
  Check for install or update.

- `/function trigger_utilities:uninstall`  
  Uninstall.

- `/trigger hat`  
  Equip mainhand items into head slot.

- `/trigger separate_item`  
  Separate mainhand items (drop items in the mainhand item without use/place). Support:

  - Shulker box (or block entity that use "Item" nbt tag)
  - Crossbow

- `/trigger kill`  
  Kill yourself instantly.

- `/trigger sit`  
  Sit on the ground.

- `/trigger death_point`  
  Teleport to your death point.

- `/trigger rtp`  
  Random teleport like a plugin.

</details>
